name: Redfish Courtbouillon Cajun Style
recipeIngredient: 28 oz Can Rotel tomatoes with chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy kettle over medium-high heat, heat the oil until hot.
2. Gradually add flour and cook, stirring constantly, until the roux is medium-dark in color.
3. Add the vegetables (onion, green pepper, celery) and cook until wilted and clear.
4. Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, sugar, salt, peppers, lemon juice, and bay leaf. Mix well.
5. Slowly add seafood stock and beer, stirring occasionally. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 to 2 hours, stirring frequently.
7. Add green onions, parsley, and fish fillets. Cook over low heat until the fish is done, about 10 to 15 minutes. Do not overcook the fish.
8. Serve hot over rice.
